---
title: "#terra"
format: gfm
---

## 2019-03-13

**Sehyun Oh** (15:24:47):
> @Sehyun Oh has joined the channel

**Sehyun Oh** (15:24:47):
> set the channel description: Discuss any issues with FireCloud/Terra

**Levi Waldron** (15:24:47):
> @Levi Waldron has joined the channel

**Sean Davis** (15:24:47):
> @Sean Davis has joined the channel


## 2019-03-14

**Sehyun Oh** (11:55:59):
> archived the channel
